sentences.target: Ich sehe die Gefahr hier am Parkplatz nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzeːə diː ɡəˈfaːɐ̯ hiːɐ̯ am ˈpaʁkplat͡s nɪçt/

translations.de: Ich sehe die Gefahr hier am Parkplatz nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzeːə diː ɡəˈfaːɐ̯ hiːɐ̯ am ˈpaʁkplat͡s nɪçt/
translations.en: I don't see the danger here in the parking lot.
translations.es: No veo peligro aquí en el estacionamiento.
translations.fr: Je ne vois pas de danger ici sur le parking.
translations.it: Qui nel parcheggio non vedo alcun pericolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在停车场这里没看到有什么危险。
translations.yue: 我喺停車場睇唔到有危險。
translations.ru: Я не вижу здесь на парковке никакой опасности.
translations.pt: Não vejo perigo aqui no estacionamento.
translations.he: אני לא רואה כאן סכנה בחניון.
translations.tr: Burada otoparkta herhangi bir tehlike görmüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi không thấy nguy hiểm gì ở bãi đỗ xe này.
translations.ar: لا أرى خطراً هنا في موقف السيارات.
translations.nl: Ik zie hier op de parkeerplaats geen gevaar.
translations.uk: Я не бачу тут на парковці жодної небезпеки.
translations.hu: Nem látok itt a parkolóban semmilyen veszélyt.
translations.hi: मुझे यहाँ सड़क पर पार्किंग में कोई खतरा दिखाई नहीं दे रहा है.
translations.pl: Nie widzę tu na parkingu żadnego zagrożenia.
translations.el: Δεν βλέπω κανέναν κίνδυνο εδώ στο πάρκινγκ.
translations.nb: Jeg ser ingen fare her på parkeringsplassen.
translations.id: Saya tidak melihat bahaya di tempat parkir ini.
translations.sv: Jag ser ingen fara här på parkeringen.
translations.ro: Nu văd niciun pericol aici în parcare.
translations.cs: Nevidím tady na parkovišti žádné nebezpečí.
translations.da: Jeg ser ingen fare her på parkeringspladsen.
translations.fi: En näe täällä parkkipaikalla mitään vaaraa.
translations.ja: この駐車場では危険は見当たりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'sehe'.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Gefahr' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'sehe'.
Adverb of place; modifies the clause, indicating location.
Preposition (contracted form of 'an dem'); governs dative and introduces the PP 'am Parkplatz'.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'am', head of the locative PP.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate to negate the statement.

sentences.target: Seine Mutter warnt ihn vor der Gefahr.
sentences.reading: /ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ vaʁnt iːn foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ɡəˈfaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Seine Mutter warnt ihn vor der Gefahr.
translations.ipa: /ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ vaʁnt iːn foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ɡəˈfaːɐ̯/
translations.en: His mother warns him about the danger.
translations.es: Su madre le advierte del peligro.
translations.fr: Sa mère le met en garde contre le danger.
translations.it: Sua madre lo avverte del pericolo.
translations.ru: Его мать предупреждает его об опасности.
translations.pt: A mãe dele o alerta sobre o perigo.
translations.vi: Mẹ anh ấy cảnh báo anh về nguy hiểm.
translations.nl: Zijn moeder waarschuwt hem voor het gevaar.
translations.uk: Його мати попереджає його про небезпеку.
translations.hi: उसकी माँ उसे खतरे के बारे में चेतावनी देती है.
translations.pl: Jego matka ostrzega go przed niebezpieczeństwem.
translations.el: Η μητέρα του τον προειδοποιεί για τον κίνδυνο.
translations.nb: Moren hans advarer ham om faren.
translations.sv: Hans mamma varnar honom för faran.
translations.ro: Mama lui îl avertizează în legătură cu pericolul.
translations.cs: Jeho matka ho varuje před nebezpečím.
translations.da: Hans mor advarer ham om faren.
translations.ja: 彼の母親は彼に危険を警告する。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Mutter'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'warnt'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object ('ihn') and a 'vor' + dative complement specifying the threat.
Personal pronoun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'warnt'.
Preposition; governs dative, introducing the PP that denotes what one is warned of.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner within the PP headed by 'Gefahr'.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Hier besteht Gefahr durch herabfallende Äste.

translations.de: Hier besteht Gefahr durch herabfallende Äste.
translations.en: There is danger here from falling branches.
translations.es: Aquí hay peligro por ramas que pueden caer.
translations.fr: Ici, il y a un danger à cause des branches qui tombent.
translations.it: Qui c'è pericolo per via dei rami che cadono.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里有掉落树枝的危险。
translations.yue: 呢度有樹枝跌落嘅危險。
translations.pt: Aqui há perigo por causa de galhos πoy podem cair.
translations.he: כאן יש סכנה מענפים שעלולים ליפול.
translations.tr: Burada düşebilecek dallar nedeniyle tehlike var.
translations.vi: Ở đây có nguy hiểm do cành cây rơi.
translations.ar: هنا توجد خطورة بسبب تساقط الأغصان.
translations.nl: Hier is er gevaar door vallende takken.
translations.hu: Itt veszély van a lehulló ágak miatt.
translations.hi: यहाँ गिरती टहनियों के कारण खतरा है.
translations.pl: Tutaj grozi niebezpieczeństwo z powodu spadających gałęzi.
translations.el: Εδώ υπάρχει κίνδυνος από κλαδιά που πέφτουν.
translations.nb: Her er det fare på grunn av fallende grener.
translations.id: Di sini ada bahaya karena dahan yang jatuh.
translations.sv: Här är det farligt på grund av fallande grenar.
translations.ro: Aici există pericol din cauza crengilor care cad.
translations.cs: Zde je nebezpečí kvůli padajícím větvím.
translations.da: Her er der fare på grund af faldende grene.
translations.ja: ここは落ちてくる枝で危険です。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb in clause-initial position; modifies the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; used existentially ('Gefahr besteht').
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'besteht'.
Preposition; governs accusative, introducing a PP that expresses cause/means.
Participial adjective derived from the separable verb 'herabfallen'; attributively modifies 'Äste' in the PP.
Common noun, masculine accusative plural; object of 'durch', head of the causal PP.

sentences.target: Die Gefahr ist heute wegen Glatteis groß.
sentences.reading: /diː ɡəˈfaːɐ̯ ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈveːɡən ˈɡlatʔaɪ̯s ɡʁoːs/

translations.de: Die Gefahr ist heute wegen Glatteis groß.
translations.ipa: /diː ɡəˈfaːɐ̯ ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈveːɡən ˈɡlatʔaɪ̯s ɡʁoːs/
translations.en: The danger is high today because of black ice.
translations.es: Hoy el peligro es alto por el hielo.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, le danger est élevé à cause du verglas.
translations.it: Oggi il pericolo è alto a causa del ghiaccio.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天因为黑冰，危险很大。
translations.yue: 今日因為黑冰，危險好大。
translations.pt: Hoje o perigo é grande por causa do gelo na rua.
translations.he: הסיכון היום גבוה בגלל קרח על הכביש.
translations.vi: Hôm nay rất nguy hiểm vì đường bị đóng băng.
translations.ar: الخطر مرتفع اليوم بسبب الجليد الأسود.
translations.nl: Vandaag is het gevaar groot door ijzel.
translations.hu: Ma nagy a veszély a tükörjég miatt.
translations.hi: आज सड़क पर बर्फ जमने की वजह से खतरा ज्यादा है.
translations.pl: Dziś zagrożenie jest duże z powodu gołoledzi.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο κίνδυνος είναι μεγάλος λόγω παγετού.
translations.nb: I dag er faren stor på grunn av glatt føre.
translations.id: Hari ini bahaya tinggi karena jalan licin akibat es.
translations.sv: Idag är risken stor på grund av blixthalka.
translations.ro: Astăzi pericolul este mare din cauza poleiului.
translations.cs: Dnes je velké nebezpečí kvůli náledí.
translations.da: I dag er faren stor på grund af glatføre.
translations.fi: Tänään vaara on suuri mustan jään takia.
translations.ja: 今日は路面凍結のため危険です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Gefahr'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'ist'.
Copular verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject with the predicate adjective 'groß'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Preposition; (standard) governs genitive, introducing a PP that expresses cause.
Common noun, neuter (genitive with 'wegen' in standard usage), used as a bare noun; object of the preposition 'wegen'.
Predicate adjective; complement of the copula 'ist', describing the subject 'Gefahr'.

Jego matka ostrzega go przed niebezpieczeństwem.

Dziś zagrożenie jest duże z powodu gołoledzi.
